body:
I have just entered my 3rd year of the 3 year membership. From the first appointment I had, with a Wonderful doctor, I have never regretted being part of the NuggMD community.

The doctors took the time to, carefully, go over my medical records and medications, I was already taking. We talked a lot, in depth about different strains and other options besides just smoking cannabis.

body:
Signed up on the site to get my medical card, and it said that they had "Same day physician access", and that "Our medical cannabis doctors are available online from 8:00am-10:00pm (PST & EST) 7 days a week!".

After signing up I try to do the consultation numerous times and it just told me, "Your doctor is currently offline. Please try again later". So I contacted support and it took them about an hour to get back to me when their support says 3 minutes. I was told that the New Mexico doctor is out on an emergency and to try back tomorrow. So I try back the next day and get the same doctor offline. I try to reach out to support yet again and get told their doctor isn't available on these days and to try back Monday. I talked to support again and get told that not all states have same day access and doctors available 7 days a week.

So make sure you check with them prior to signing up if you're expecting same-day appointment. Once I got the appointment though it was a quick and easy process to get the rest of the process done.

body: Horrible service and inaccurate, infective treatment. My mother had an appointment and was approved for treatment for herREMOVED. The doctor told her she would get THC at a low percentage, he described gummies. He said we could go pick it up immediately when she was approved. Apparently none of this was true. According to the dispensary, you have to wait a period of time to have your information register at the dispensary, and you have to place an order in advance. Then, the next day once we call the dispensary to check on our status, they informed us that the prescription was for CBD only and they could not fill it. Upon contacting nugg MD, they claimed that there was a discussion about CBD only and that THC could cause paranoia and other disturbances. Absolutely none of that was discussed, and all of their information so far has been completely incorrect. Their handling of this issue has also been in very poor taste, lacking tact and just general empathy and care. No one needs a pres

body: Know my review has nothing to do with the Doctor I had my Video Call with and he was very good and understanding. My reason for a One (1) Star Review is, when I first picked NuggMD with the List from Original Marijuana provided that the cost was supposed to be $49 and a pop up window supposedly was to give another $15 discount, which never happened. When I got to the NuggMD website the price radically changed to Best Pick for $118 for 1 year. So what happened to to the $49 price on Original Marijuana that led me to NuggMD and the supposed extra $15 discount??? Once I got approved the email then stated, "Keep in mind, you required to complete a follow up appointment in 3 months, with a price of $50 for the follow up." This seems to be a scam since the $118 was supposed to be for 1 year and there was no mention of any required follow up for $50 every 3 months thereafter. I will never use them again, this is a Total Rip Off!!!!!

body: NuggMD online is a big joke! Booked an appointment 4 days in advance, drove and hour and a half and the doctor wasn't even there, nor did NuggMD even bother to schedule the appointment! Knew the doctor was going to be out at my appointment time yet no one reached out to me via, phone, text, or email. Was promised a call back in 3 days which never came either. Took my money, have tied it up now for 2 weeks while I await a full refund. Nothing but excuses and blaming everything on the doctor when it was clearly their fault! They are only in it for the money. Wasted my time, gas and patience on this company and nothing to show for it.   I was even told by staff that I wasn't the only one this happened to, as there were 2 others that day who didn't see a doctor either. They told me this happens all the time. The whole thing sounds like a scam to get your money. I'm willing to bet most of these reviews here are fake or paid reviews. THE ENTIRE OPERATION STINKS OF RED FLAGS! What I really don't like is now they have all my vital information and I have nothing!! Do yourself a favor if you want a Medical Marijuana Card, go local not some fly by night online company. Horrible, Horrible experience. You have to wonder about a company that has no phone support, or is unwilling to call you when there's a problem. NEGATIVE STARS IN MY BOOK!!

I called another well known dispensary several times but only got an answering machine, never a person. Stoney at New Leaf answered the 1st time. He explained the process and was very patient with me and all my questions. I went on a Saturday to start procedures and was sure nothing would happen that day. I was wrong. Had a video appt with Dr Garcia at NuggMD who approved my application on the spot, due to my issues. I received my card on Monday. Every step was easy peasy because of Stoney. body:
It was a very quick process and the phone call was probably about 5 minutes long. Perhaps my call was shorter than it was for others because I was renewing my existing card/membership. I appreciated being asked if my primary care provider was aware that I was in the program and said yes. I’ll happily use NuggMD in the future.

One concern I have is that some users may enroll in the medical cannabis program without having a formal sit down with their own MD first. Some users have children who need the full attention of their parents and should be counseled by their physicians on when to use cannabis and when to abstain. Driving after smoking should be a conversation to have with the physician as should various other treatments like physical therapy.

NuggMD  is great for renewing your existing membership in the program, but I believe that, since it’s a medical use program, there should be counseling and discussion before using for the first time. Most people have access to recreational cannabis through dispensaries and have the personal freedom to use or not.

body: This was my first experience with purchasing medical marijuana and it went very smoothly. I found lots of services in my state that claimed they would evaluate me via the internet and provide medical authorization for my purchase, but I had no idea which ones were real and which were fake.  So I asked the official marijuana dispensary if they could give me a reliable name to complete that process and they suggested NuggMD.  My evaluation was done by teleconference the same day and I immediately received official approval from the state Cannabis Control Authority, which I used to purchase my initial order of gummies.  It was all quite easy even for someone like myself who is not skilled at computer tasks like uploading documents.

body: This was my 5th renewal and certainly will be my last. Previous 4 times, I’ve only even had a call from a 2 times counting this last time. Normally disconnects and it’s just approved anyway. The 24 hours used to be 10-15 minutes but now is an advertisement scam more than anything. Completed my doctor visit at 0800. At 1100 I had messaged asking is this was normal as it never had been. Was told I’d get it later that day. 2200 rolls around, all OCM shops are closed and I message back to cancel it. Most dispensaries now offer carts for half of this and you walk out with cert and product if you’d like. After messaging, she agreed to cancel and the magically my certification was in my profile although I had looked 30 seconds before. Asked to speak to a manager and was told I’ll get an email. No email. Also they date it to the day you had your doctors visit. FAQ says it can take up to 7 business days. That’s a week they are stealing from your cert. look around for ten minutes and guarantee you can find a better deal on life well alone. 89 dollar certs, same day and no shadiness when trying to cancel. Googled cannabis cert discount and first one too pop up is attached. And attached is chat transcript of me asking to have it cancelled before receiving cert and them uploading cert so I cannot cancel.  PLEASE TAKE 5 MINUTES AND GOOGLE! So much better deals.

body: I thought this was gonna be easy, I've been in pain for years MS, arthritis, fibromyalgia to name a few. So after years of suffering and being told the process is is and have many certified Dr. I went online did paperwork paid the fee, spoke with a Dr. By name Josia Henry MD on September 3rd 2024 at 11:32 AM. After speaking with Dr I was told I was approved give it 24 hours then go to site fill out the paperwork through my state for my medical marijuana card, when I did the Dr approval certificate was still not in system, so I gave it a few more days, still nothing, so I contacted a support team representative on NuggMDby name of Adam whom has been helpful, but today is September 9, 2024 and Adam has stated he told his supervisor and has tried to get in touch with the Dr. I spoke with he stated he has sent several messages and still not heard back from the Dr. That was Thursday last week still nothing, at this point I just want my money back for the fee of the Dr. They were quick to take my money, yet still the state hasn't received anything and it's been 6 days, I've been patient but I've lost hope and am on fixed disability income and can't afford to pay for a service not rendered. Thanks in advance for time Jviant71

body:

body:
Getting a medical marijuana card in WV seemed a bit daunting to me at first, so I decided to reach out to my local dispensary. Fortunately for me they recommended Nuggmd. The website was quite intuitive, and the process was streamlined. I want to say that it only took me maybe 5 minutes of filling out the form before joining the queue to speak to a physician. My wait time for the physician was about 15 minutes. My physician was professional, friendly, patient, and attentive. He went over my form, and after asking some questions was able to give me a recommendation before we completed our appointment. From there, I was sent an email with further instruction on how to complete my states form. 
This is about as easy as it gets, and I would recommend this site to anybody.

body: I have been attempting to get a new ID card as I never received one ORIGINALLY. I was met first with push back and a request to pay for the card. I was immediately contacted by a supervisor who was upset that I threatened to "blast" them, however in retrospect, It seems that this is the only recourse to solve my dilemma. All I want is a new card. They offered me a financial discount for one of the three years I paid for, but I just want a replacement card. Not the money...Is it that difficult? By God, I hope this review ends up in front of the right pair of eyes of someone who will just send me the replacement card and I will happily change my reviews. But for now it's only getting worse......fingers crossed!

Fast forward a little over a week and checking in three more times, I was informed by email that they were rejecting the application because NuggMD or their doctor said it was going to be too far for me to drive for the in person visit!  I regularly drive over an hour to go to the VA hospital so seeing their provider would have been no problem.  Very upset that they offer a service to veterans and then don't deliver.

body: I wasn't able to do the zoom visit.  I couldn't get to work.  So the doctor call me on my cell phone.  He was very pleasant.  He was able to answer all my questions.  I told him I had gone to pain management and I felt they weren't really concerned about how I felt.  They asked me of couple question on my pain level.  Then either increased my pain pills.  Being in the medical field myself, I know how easy it can be to become addicted to pain pills.  I have seen it myself with family and friends.  So he understood my concern about pain pills.  I told him I needed something for my back pain.  Something I could take that wasn't habit forming.  He was very understanding of my needs and I really did appreciate that.  He made me feel like a real person.  So thank you for caring about me.

body: I was hesitant about getting a marijuana card. I researched all the other companies and decided on NuggMD. I expected a hassle from start to finish. I was so surprised how easy they made it for me. I had an issue during payment where I was stuck and I contacted the online help (very kind and efficient) and I was able to refresh the page and continue with the process. I did a voice call with the doctor who was very compassionate about my condition and just put me at ease. After the call I received the approval email with instructions on how to proceed. I cannot stress enough to read the instructions carefully. If you follow them to a tee you will not have a problem. I uploaded the required documents to the State and waited for it to process. I logged into the state account the next day and seen my approval. I received emails from NuggMD following up with me offering any assistance if I needed it. I started the application at 12:55pm on a Tuesday and I received my State Approval at 9:00a

body: I have been usingREMOVEDfor years to get my renewal prescriptions. It is so much easier and more efficient than the previous method of having to see my specific physician for a letter, and also so much less expensive. I also appreciate that verification is accessible to dispensaries 24/7, as opposed to the previous issues of doctors offices being closed for lunch or the day or weekend! I was surprised this year that there was very little discussion with the physician, and that there was no interest in my updating my X-rays or records which are years old, but my qualifying conditions havent changed, there just are more of them. I did notice this year add ons for various fees, with different degrees of consultation. I do not need any consultation as I am a consultant myself, but was surprised to see charges for things that had been previously discussed for free with the prescribing doctor. If I were a new user, I likely would not recommend this service without a consult. But as a frequen

It was easy to navigate through the website, very straightforward, and when i was contacted by the doctor i didnt have to download the video chat app, she was able to go around that and contact me directly. It was very quick, everything was taken care of the same day. The only thing i had to wait for was the email from the state, and i received that the following morning. The price wasnt bad, cheaper than i expected. I really wish i would have done this the same day i heard about it. To whoever takes the time to read my long winded, chunky review to the end, dont hesitate. Its worth every bit of time and money going through NuggMd. I could keep gushing over this website

Other than that, I would recommend NuggMD.
